/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pedantic -D_GNU_SOURCE -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/logger.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/fs_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/mime_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/html_parser.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/html_render.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/core/imap_util.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/infrastructure/config_store.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/infrastructure/setup_wizard.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/infrastructure/curl_adapter.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/infrastructure/cache_store.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/domain/email_service.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/platform/posix/terminal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/platform/posix/path.c.o" "CMakeFiles/email-cli.dir/src/platform/posix/html_medium.c.o" -o email-cli  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
